title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Ananda in the Himalayas - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Ananda in the Himalayas - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Ananda in the Himalayas are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ananda in the Himalayas:
Ananda in the Himalayas is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas!
